theorem pigeon_hole_principle (n r : ‚Ąē) (h : r < n) (object_to_boxes : Fin n ‚Üí Fin r) :
  ‚ąÉ box : Fin r, ‚ąÉ object‚āĀ object‚āā : Fin n,
  object‚āĀ ‚Č† object‚āā ‚ąß
  object_to_boxes object‚āĀ = box ‚ąß

  have ‚ü®object‚āĀ, object‚āā, h_object‚ü© :=
      Fintype.exists_ne_map_eq_of_card_lt object_to_boxes (by convert h <;> simp)
  use object_to_boxes object‚āĀ
  use object‚āĀ
  use object‚āā
  tauto
```
